domain: Faroese føroysk-húgva knitted shawl tradition (Faroe Islands): triangular side-panels + trapezoidal back gusset; bottom-up construction; structural decrease ladders at panel boundaries narrow upward toward neck; 5-motif vocabulary diamond+lattice+cable-twist+lace-hole+plain fills the pattern grid; mis-counting at decrease ladder propagates as topological winding-number drift along boundary; deliberate vs accidental defect distinction
specific_mechanism: FAROESE-3-PANEL-DEFECT-LADDER-WINDING: per-attention-head topology classifier with (1) 3-panel cellular decomposition: attention pattern partitioned into 3 head-class panels P_side1, P_side2, P_gusset via per-head feature clustering; (2) 5-motif vocabulary V_motif {diamond, lattice, cable-twist, lace-hole, plain} fitted to local 4×4 attention windows; per-head dominant-motif histogram; (3) decrease-ladder winding-number signature W_l = cumulative orientation winding of dominant attention direction along panel-boundary trajectory per layer-depth band l; healthy model winds monotonically by ~2π per band; (4) misalignment-defect propagation tracker: defect detected when |dW_l| exceeds π/4 within single layer; propagates along boundary like knit-miscount cascading through subsequent layers; (5) per-defect localized LoRA patch on offending head-boundary subspace for repair finetune. Differs from R501 BAGAJDA-BORE-PROFILE-ATLAS (centroid mahalanobis defect, no 3-panel + no motif vocab + no winding-number) and R514 ROSEMALING-C-S-STROKE-CURVE-VOCAB-DEFECT (2-primitive C-S curve + winding-number topology, no 3-panel decomposition + no decrease-ladder + no misalignment-propagation) and R476 IDRIJA-LACE-DEFECT (lace bobbin defect, no panel decomposition) by 3-panel cellular decomposition + 5-motif vocabulary + decrease-ladder winding signature + misalignment-defect propagation tracker.
llm_application: FAROESE-3-PANEL-DEFECT-LADDER-WINDING per-attention-head topology classifier with 3-panel cellular decomposition P_side1+P_side2+P_gusset via clustering + 5-motif vocabulary {diamond, lattice, cable-twist, lace-hole, plain} dominant-motif histogram + decrease-ladder winding-number signature W_l cumulative orientation along panel-boundary per layer-band + misalignment-defect propagation tracker |dW_l| > π/4 cascade + per-defect localized LoRA patch repair finetune. Differs from R103 TDA-CoT. R475 (?). R476 IDRIJA-LACE-DEFECT. R489 PERSIAN-MEDALLION-ROT. R501 BAGAJDA-BORE-PROFILE-ATLAS. R514 ROSEMALING-C-S-STROKE-CURVE-VOCAB-DEFECT (closest — 2-primitive C-S vocab + winding-number, no 3-panel + no decrease-ladder + no misalignment). Differs from TOHA + Hidden Holes + Vulnerability TDA + Attention Sinks Topology by 3-panel cellular + 5-motif vocab + decrease-ladder winding + misalignment-defect propagation + repair LoRA. Differs by 3-PANEL CELLULAR DECOMPOSITION + 5-MOTIF VOCABULARY + DECREASE-LADDER WINDING-NUMBER SIGNATURE + MISALIGNMENT-DEFECT PROPAGATION + LOCALIZED LORA PATCH.
novelty_claim: TOHA Topological Divergence Attention 2504.10063 + Hidden Holes 2406.05798 + Vulnerability Detection TDA 2410.03470 + Attention Sinks Topology cover TDA-attention defect detection space. FAROESE-3-PANEL-DEFECT-LADDER-WINDING adds (a) 3-panel cellular head-class decomposition + (b) 5-motif vocabulary diamond/cable/lattice/lace-hole/plain dominant-histogram + (c) decrease-ladder winding-number signature per layer-band + (d) misalignment-defect propagation tracker cascade detection + (e) per-defect localized LoRA repair patch. Recombination — borderline lookup.
